task_description: Phase 86: Complete the headline user flows that are currently dead stubs in otherwise-complete apps. quantmail compose Send/Save buttons have no onClick and inputs are unbound (the full useEmail.sendEmail hook is unused); quantdrive Upload + Share are dead stubs (handleUpload = `void files`); quantmeet has NO video at all (no livekit-client/getUserMedia; VideoTile shows initials, PreJoinLobby shows literal 'Camera preview' text); quantai conversation history is ephemeral (never loaded/persisted) and quantchat uses 3 conflicting backend targets with a getConversations call that has no route. (NOTE: quantai SSE streaming was already added by Kiro in PR #109 — do NOT redo it; focus on conversation persistence + quantchat unification.)
